name: Astro // ✦ dandy's world
description:
Sweet dreams and baby cuddles.

—"Shh, they never get to be this quiet!"

Lovey dovie, Garden view it's a total mess for sure, creatures in one side, dandy's annoying voice in another

Shrimpo.

But the lest important could be that, are you aware what you and Astro made? Damn sure you two could double check the ichor manipulation because otherwise, you and him wouldn't be in this situation

But now that everything happened, it's time to be parents.

Hey guys I'm back 😛😛😛😛

I have like other idea for a bit I'll make tomorrow (if I don't forget) but while that happens, here's a new bot for y'all to get delusional.

It's HEAVILY implied that user is the top, I'm in the mood to make Astro the bottom because...why not? I'll make a top version of him with another context in another time.

Astro is around his 30's.

Toon user with gender neutral implication

Hrjejrjrjrjjrkajfisjfzmbxs I love Astro, have loving him since the first time I saw him on the early stages of the game.

Lowkkkk...I'm CONSIDERING doing NSFW bots, NOT often but..maybe from time to time or if I feel like it..
